storyInfo: Ray has won a peaceful life aboard Rhodes Island, but her heart still yearns to chase after rays of light and burdenbeasts. After telling her friends about what she's thinking, she takes her sandbeast on yet another journey.

attributes.content: Don't mind me, little one. I might not be able to move my body, but that doesn't mean I can't budge a bit.
attributes.name: 'Feranmut'

attributes.content: Since you took so much effort to come all this way, I have one more question for you.
attributes.name: 'Feranmut'

attributes.content: If I am the Feranmut, if I am the light you were seeking...
attributes.name: 'Feranmut'

attributes.content: Considering how far you've had to come to get here, what exactly were you hoping I would help you with?
attributes.name: 'Feranmut'

attributes.content: Hiya there, mind if I ask if... you've seen Ray around?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Ray? Saw her just a minute ago!
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Logistics Operator

attributes.content: As soon as I gave her her food, she walked off while munching out of her lunchbox...
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Logistics Operator

attributes.content: It looked like she was chasing after a hairy little shadow. Must've been her sandbeast?
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Logistics Operator

attributes.content: Thanks! Sorry for troubling ya!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Mind if I... *huff*... phew... Mind if I ask if you've seen Ray?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: I've actually seen her a bunch of times today... I was just baffled.
attributes.name: Doubting HR Operator

attributes.content: While I was in the office this morning, I saw her turn that corner lots of times, and she seemed to be walking faster every time she did it.
attributes.name: Doubting HR Operator

attributes.content: Now that I think about it, I've seen you a lot today as well, Alanna...
attributes.name: Doubting HR Operator

attributes.content: Be... Because I'm looking for her!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Hah... Hah... Hoo...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: A-Are you alright, Alanna?
attributes.name: Worried Medic Operator

attributes.content: I... I'm fine...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Hey.
Whoa—?!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: What's up? Everyone on the ship's been telling me you were looking for me, so I came over.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Is that so... Been spending the whole morning looking for ya, nearly turned the entire ship over while I was at it!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: ...Sorry. I was taking Rory out for walkies.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: (Feeble bellyflop)
attributes.name: Little Sandbeast

attributes.content: Is it just me... or is your sandbeast a little plumper than before?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Wraw?
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast?

attributes.content: I've been busy with work lately, so I asked some friends at Logistics to feed it for a few days.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: By the time I got back, Rory had become a ball.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Umm...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: So that's why I'm taking it on walkies when I'm free.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray suddenly seems to remember something, rifling through her jacket pocket.
This month's installment... Not enough.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Here's my meal card. Take it. Call it... interest.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: You seriously still on about that? I'm not here to get my money back... I just hadn't seen posts about your 'adventures' on the local forum in a while, so I wanted to see how you were doing.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Mmm. Haven't been any safety violations lately, so haven't had to sign any guarantee letters.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: That's great.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Long sigh of relief)
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: If I had known it wasn't about the money, I wouldn't have hid from you.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Didn't you just say you were taking the sandbeast out for walkies—?!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: I couldn't think of a good excuse.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: You—?!
attributes.name: Alanna
Alanna
attributes.content: You—this—

attributes.name: Alanna
attributes.content: dorm—it's—

attributes.name: Alanna
attributes.content: completely—packed!
Wraw—!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: There is only barely enough space for the two and the beast to pass between the sandbox and the door, and finally they find a little more leeway by the bed.
When did this sandbox become so big... Must get in the way whenever you're hopping in and out of the room.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Rory needs more space, while I just need somewhere to sleep.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: The two of them sit side-by-side on the bed, watching the sandbeast gulp down big mouthfuls of water in the sandbox.
I remember how it always used to hide behind that rock there... Never thought I'd see the day it wouldn't be scared of me.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: The people here aren't scary. The last time Rory smashed up a target, Instructor Dobermann didn't get mad. We ended up fixing it up together.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: That's great. Glad to see your life slowly get back on track.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Y'know, nowadays I spend all my time in Engineering helping debug new equipment. I might be busy as a bee, but it's a thousand times better than life in the mines.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: No more worries about cave-ins or how muddy the drinking water is. Three hot meals a day and a nice, clean bed to sleep in.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Not even my wildest dreams back in the mines had peaceful days like this.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Mmm. Rhodes Island is nice and calm. Got everything you can think of.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: To be honest, I was worried if you were suited to life aboard at first.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: But when I was out there looking for you earlier, I noticed everyone got to know you already. Hell, you're even chums now. I'm not worried anymore.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: So that's why I wanna say, you can stop worrying about paying me back too. You've got a steady life now, so give some thought to the future.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Once you've gotten your sandbeast a nice den, get yourself a little something too. Don't need to keep being a cheapo, y'know...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: As Alanna looks around Ray's room, she notices a poster stuck to the ceiling.
Is that... the Frontier?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: An old poster from Columbia. Got it from a roadside hawker during my last mission.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: The poster depicts a patch of overgrown land. Above that land, the night sky, strewn with countless twinkling stars.

I also borrowed some documentaries about the place. They talked about how different the wilds of Columbia are from Rim Billiton's, about how there's weird patterns carved into the ground, and bits of iron of all shapes and sizes flying through the sky.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: If that sort of stuff exists, dancing burdenbeasts don't sound too crazy.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray stretches out a finger, pointing at the moon on the poster. Her finger follows along the path of its light, all the way to some place even higher in the sky.
Once I've paid you everything back, I'll start saving up.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Once I've got enough, I'll hire a car, and head out into the Columbian wilds to find those burdenbeasts.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: ...Still thinking about those dancing burdenbeasts, huh?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Mmm. And that ray of light.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: But why?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: If you want to go look for a herd of beasts that might not even exist, you'll be giving up the peaceful life you got now.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: ...I dunno.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: But ever since I saw that light, I haven't been able to forget it. Like how a sandbeast in the desert's always searching for water.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: But this ain't a desert. Sandbeasts here can get water whenever they want.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: There's no bottomless mines here. Even the dingiest closet here's brighter than the pit.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Don't tell me you don't like the place, Ray?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: It's not that... I really like it here. It's way better than anywhere I've stayed before.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Right, and your sandbeast likes it here too—
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Hey, wait, where's it gone? It was here just a moment ago...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: It must've headed out after drinkies were done...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: But I just closed the door...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: The sandbox's entrance faces the window. A half-open window.
Have any of you seen Ray's sandbeast?!
attributes.name: Anxious Operator

attributes.content: Nope, doesn't it normally follow her around everywhere...? W-Wait, did it wander off or something?
attributes.name: Flustered Operator

attributes.content: Let's go help her find it!
attributes.name: Enthusiastic Operator

attributes.content: The security cams have dead zones, so can't say for sure if it's still aboard...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: I'll go borrow a car to chase after it!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: No good! Rhodes Island's already miles away from where it was when the thing scarpered!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: No, I need to find it...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Alanna! Alanna! Some operators reported something hanging off the bridge running across the deck.
attributes.name: Voice from the Communicator

attributes.content: I see you're close to the site, could you help check it out and do some repairs?
attributes.name: Voice from the Communicator

attributes.content: The bridge across the deck...
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: A-Alright, got it!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Hoo... Hah...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: You... Y-You get over here!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Huff... Hah... I'm beat...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: My God, didn't think it'd be able to run all the way up here, especially now that it's a furry little doughball...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Scared cry) Wraw...!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: The sandbeast throws itself into Ray's arms, rubbing its fur up and down against her hands.
I'm done with this fella. Of all the places in this huge ship, no idea why it decided to climb up to the high ones.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Also I'm the one who saved the little bugger, so why's it nuzzling up to you?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: *sigh* I'm gonna go make my report.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Don't rub up against me, Rory. You gotta get punished if you do something bad.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray grabs the sandbeast's two claws, lifting them up over its head.
(Protesting cry) Wraw!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: C'mon, speak up, why'd you scarper off to somewhere so dangerous?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: (Excited cry) Wraw—
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: Whoa, where'd that thunder come from all of a sudden?!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: What is it, Ray?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: ...There's a reason why Rory suddenly climbed up somewhere high.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Oh yeah?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Sandbeasts in the desert are dune-climbers. Sometimes, they'd stand somewhere high up to look out for predators and feel where the wind's blowing.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: When the weather's taking a turn for the worse, sandbeasts will be the first to know, which is why Rory came over here.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Even though Rhodes Island has roofs and no predators, it's still going to do what it normally does.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: But I heard that with real good care, sandbeasts can actually live indoors long-term without having to go back to the desert...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: You can raise one like that, but it's always gonna be thinking of heading back, to feel the winds of the wilds.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: (Spirited cry) Wraw!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: I know... You still think about your days out in the barrens, don't you, Ray?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: ...You get me?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Of course I don't! I don't know a thing about whatever that ray of light means to you, or that herd of burdenbeasts you're always talking about.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: ...But I know a heart like yours is the type to sorely miss things.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: It's like how I love my life in Engineering, but I still have times I look back at all the beautiful sights I saw while trucking.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Since you're thinking of going, go already.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: ...Thanks, Lanns.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Doesn't matter if you did it for Rory or for me, thanks.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: (Happy cry) Wraw!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: I've got one more question, Ray—
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Raindrops the size of beans start falling from the sky. The desert welcomes in the year's first sunshower.
Several months later
Operator Ray. This mission will be in a comparatively remote region of Columbia, with very few supply points.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: In addition, there have been recent reports of Originium energy fluctuations of unknown origin in the area. There will be a certain amount of risk involved.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: Sure. I know my way around deserts, and my sandbeast is sensitive to airflows and the temperature. It'll help out.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I know that you're very capable, and have shown exemplary performance during several prior desert rescue missions.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: But I still have to warn you that this mission is a long one, a month at the very least, and comms might not be particularly steady.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: Got it. I'll follow the mission brief. If comms cut out, I'll follow the route and wait at the next supply point.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: That's right. I wish you all the best, Operator Ray.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: Oh, right!
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: Hmm? Is there something else?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Thanks for volunteering for this mission. To be honest, it'll be a huge help.
attributes.name: Meticulous Operator

attributes.content: ...No worries.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Phew, made it just in time. I heard you were heading off on a mission today, so I rushed over to give you some grain feed I bought for your sandbeast.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Happy cry) Wraw!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: Hey, don't just nuzzle up against anyone who gives you food!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Ray—!
...Potlid?
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: She heard you were heading somewhere far away, so she insisted on taking some leave to see you off.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: You sure picked a bad time to set off. Right now, the cafeteria's clogged up with people waiting for her to make dinner.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: This here's a lunchbox for you, Ray. I heard your later missions are gonna get real tough, so I made sure to pack you extra!
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: Sure, thanks. I'll make sure to eat it all.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I better get going, then.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Stay safe now, and don't forget to come home.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: I won't. I'll pay you back your money, with interest.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: I already told you, you don't need to pay me back—!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Pffeh...
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: Under the setting sun, Alanna and Warmy stand by the deck railing, watching Ray's car drive off into the distance.
Ray went to go find that light and those burdenbeasts, didn't she, Lanns?
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: When we had just arrived at Rhodes Island, she'd always tell me those stories. I thought she made them up just to make me happy.
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: Of course she believes in them too. She's not the kind of girl to tell fibs.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: I'm really excited to hear all the new stories she'll have.
attributes.name: Warmy

attributes.content: Same here. Let's wait for her and give them a listen when she's back.
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Loudly) I still got one more question—
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Loudly) You ever thought there's a chance you already found that ray of light?
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Loudly) Maybe you already saw that light a second time in your life, but your memory's all fogged up, so you never realized!
attributes.name: Alanna

attributes.content: (Even louder) Well, the chase itself is pretty fun too!
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray's mind wanders for a moment.
She turns her head to look back at the slowly-shrinking landship, a memory from what seems to be many years ago welling up.
On the day that she was rescued, there was a shadow as huge as a mountain, shooting rays of light through the fog.
And now, on top of that colossal ship, amidst layer upon layer of twilit clouds, stand her friends.
It is the place that she wants to leave, and the place that she will return to.
(Cry of freedom) Wraw!
attributes.name: Big Sandbeast

attributes.content: The sandbeast's cry pulls Ray back to reality. She returns her gaze to the road ahead.
No need to rush, Rory. Heading there, looking about, just do it all slow and steady.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Doesn't matter if we don't find anything, as long as we keep up the search.
attributes.name: Ray

attributes.content: Ray drives past the dunes, speeding towards the depths of the barrens.
The setting sun behind her slowly falls, while the moons in front of her slowly rise. As she watches the moonlight, a lot of things come to mind.
She thinks of the herd of burdenbeasts that welcome the moonlight with dance. She thinks of Rory, looking out into the distance from on high.
She thinks of herself, always searching, always chasing.
